luggage.name: AWAY Carry-On
luggage.notes: A solid choice, especially for North American flights

luggage.name: BEIS Small Carry-On
luggage.notes: One of the 'shortest' on my list, holds a surprising amount

luggage.name: July Carry On Light Expandable
luggage.notes: Choose this one if you need the most size but light weight

luggage.name: July Carry-On Essential
luggage.notes: I haven't tried July luggage yet, but I've read many positive reviews

luggage.name: Monos Carry-On
luggage.notes: I love my monos, has worked great all over Europe

luggage.name: AWAY Softside Carry-on
luggage.notes: I loved using this in Japan

luggage.name: Briggs & Riley Global 20" Carry-on
luggage.notes: An investment, but one of the highest-rated brands in the luggage world

luggage.name: Travelpro Maxlite 5 Softside 19" 4-wheel
luggage.notes: Trusty brand, good durability & lots of pockets

luggage.name: Travelpro Maxlite 5 Softside 20" 2-wheel
luggage.notes: 2-wheel has a litle more interior space than the 4 wheel

luggage.name: Amazon Basics 21"
luggage.notes: I haven't tested the quality, but reviews are decent and price is right!

luggage.name: Bagsmart Blast 43L Roller Backpack
luggage.notes: Roller bag & backpack all-in-one for ultimate flexibility

luggage.name: Hanke 20 Inch Top-Opening
luggage.notes: A rare hardshell that is 'top-open' design

luggage.name: Quince Small Carry-On Suitcase
luggage.notes: A perfect 'dupe' of the AWAY hardshell (make sure you choose this size)
